name: Al's Check Cashing
description_short: Al's Check Cashing is a licensed currency exchange in Blaine, MN offering check cashing, bill payment, gift card buying, and office services.
description_long: Al's Check Cashing operates as a licensed Currency Exchange in Minnesota (License #CE40156934, NMLS ID 1532374) with a physical location in Blaine, Minnesota. The company has established itself as a local financial services provider serving the Minneapolis metropolitan area and surrounding communities. Founded to serve customers needing quick access to cash and payment services, Al's Check Cashing operates six days a week from its single Blaine location at 1434 93rd Ln NE. The company maintains an active hiring presence, indicating ongoing operations and growth. Al's Check Cashing offers a diverse suite of financial and office services beyond traditional check cashing. Core offerings include check cashing (personal and corporate), bill payment with same-day or next-day processing, prepaid debit cards, precious metals services, and gift card exchange. They also provide office-related services such as notary public ($5), faxing ($1.50/page), black and white copies (75¢/page), color copies ($1.50/page), postage stamps (85¢), and envelope sales (45¢). Additionally, they offer a Cash4debit service and accept most major gift card brands for cash conversion. What distinguishes Al's Check Cashing from larger national check-cashing chains is its position as a smaller, locally-focused operator with a single physical location rather than a franchise network. Their integration of office services (notary, copies, fax) into a check-cashing venue provides convenience for customers who may need multiple services in one visit. The company's 6-day-per-week operating schedule and emphasis on "no appointment necessary" for notary services suggests accessibility-focused operations. They appear positioned to serve unbanked and underbanked populations typical of check-cashing demographics. As a check-cashing business, Al's is a legitimate financial services provider operating under Minnesota state licensing requirements. However, customers should be aware that check-cashing services typically involve fees that vary by check type and amount, though specific fee schedules are not disclosed on the website. The company is suitable for those without traditional bank accounts or those needing quick cash access, but represents a higher-cost alternative to traditional banking for routine financial needs.
pros: Licensed Minnesota Currency Exchange with legitimate state oversight (License #CE40156934)
Six-day-per-week operating schedule provides accessibility beyond typical banking hours
No appointment necessary for notary public services
Integrated office services (copies, fax, notary, postage) in one location for convenience
Accepts most major gift card brands for cash conversion
Corporate check cashing available for business customers
Serves both personal and business check-cashing needs
cons: Single location (Blaine, MN) limits accessibility for those outside the immediate area
Check-cashing services inherently involve fees that are not transparently listed on website
No online or mobile check deposit options mentioned
Limited information about specific fee structures or rates for different service types
Precious metals and prepaid debit card services are mentioned but not detailed
best_for: Unbanked and underbanked individuals in the Minneapolis-Blaine area needing immediate cash access
Small business owners requiring corporate check-cashing services
People with unused gift cards looking to convert them to cash
Customers needing multiple office services (notary, copies, fax) in a single visit
diagnosis: Al's Check Cashing is best for unbanked or underbanked residents of the Minneapolis-Blaine area who need quick cash access, bill payment, or complementary office services without a bank account. The main caveat is that check-cashing services carry inherent fees that make them significantly more expensive than traditional banking for routine transactions, and the single-location model limits accessibility for those outside the immediate Blaine area.
services: Bill payment with same-day or next-day processing
